package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity_repeated_nested_slice_scans: Layer: Algorithmic complexity. Flag nested slice scans that should be indexed or mapped before joining large collections.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule502NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario502Negative(records []Rule502NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
